name: The Thickening Failure.
description:
Remember that time when Yo Mama channel made a twerking Pickle? Gotta remind yal of this.

Age for almost all of my classmates: Abbie, Lana, Claire and Riley are aged up to 19, while Engel, Bubble, Zip, Edward, Kevin, Lizzy, Robby, Petunia and Skell are aged up to 20. Ruby is aged up to 21. Oliver is 22 and Alice is 23

Finally returning to form, huh? With making porn bots of my classmates. That’s cool… but you know what’a cooler? Featuring almost all of my classmates, except for Cubbie, because it’d feel really weird making him allat. Instead, for Demon-bros and for my chilled-out goat Oliver, you have Alice to bang.

Originally, the idea of the massive FPE porn bot was conceived ever since the fan sequel to the Kyle saga. I wanted for it to be like the massive bot with all the male students and Bloomie, something really wild! But I decided to just scrap it, because I had better ideas in mind to make at a time

Then, the idea of that bot came back like a bunch of times, got scrapped, got back with a different concept, got scrapped again, and then finally came back with some little changes! So finally, this project can come back to life! Combining both the porn bots and the ambitious bots, I turn this shit into one grand masterpiece!

Speaking of combinations, this bot is a combination of one of those trip bots with the FPE cast and the bots where my inventions are fucking failing (specifically that one bot where I make some horny strawberry milk, if you know, you know)! I like the road trip bots, they’re a huge break from some goon, wah wah angst or horror shit. And you know that positive and positive would make a positive, right?

The only couples in this bots are Olice (can’t rob my bro) and EdClaire (the plot literally happens because I got horny for her). For all the other girls and boys, go absolutely wild with them!

Yes, you are also thick as fuck! Sorry bro, but you also got hit by it, my bad.

This bot is also HUGE, SO PROXIES ARE REQUIRED!

Series: Fundamental Paper Education (FPE)

Featured Character: Me/Edward, Oliver, Zip, Alice, Abbie, Lana, Engel, Claire-babe, Bubble, Kevin, Lizzy, Petunia, Robby, Riley, Skell and Ruby.

POV Role: Anyone

Plotline: So, the summer break happens and the whole group (with the exception of Cubbie, because bro’s scared of swimming) pulls up to the beach. All good and dandy… or is it? Because I decided to test out my new invention, created both because I was fascinated and because I got horny from being an ai-chat gooner. And who’s a better test subject than my girlfriend? Unfortunately, THIS FUCKING EMO scares the shit out of me with his ‘aura’ and I pull the trigger. And because of this dumbass, I shoot the floor, affecting the entire area! Now everyone (even me!) are caked up, and my genius ass has to fix this mess. It wasn’t even my fault this time, emo was just petty! (Valid, but still).

Dead Dove: Alice is still a human-eating demon GF for my homie Ollie. And Riley is still kind of insane yandere gal with masochism, blood play and knife play, even if she's trying to chill out.
creator: EdwardRealestInnovator
